description.short: Skills, memory, and tool orchestration for trusted Microsoft/Azure outcomes.
description.full:
HaeronClaw combines Skills, Work Memory, and MCP Tools to deliver practical, source-grounded Microsoft and Azure support.

[Skills - What the agent can do]
- Cloud and Architecture: compare options, explain trade-offs, and provide implementation guidance
- Pricing and Planning: estimate costs, evaluate scenarios, and summarize budget impact
- Knowledge and Q&A: answer product, platform, and policy questions with grounded context
- Content and Deliverables: produce business-ready documents, presentations, and structured outputs
- Strategy Advisory: support GTM, product strategy, and technical decision-making

[Work Memory - How knowledge is used]
- Curated internal references are used to preserve consistency and institutional context
- Prior responses are aligned with approved guidance and reusable best practices
- Answers prioritize relevance, traceability, and clear source attribution

[MCP Tools - How execution happens]
- Retrieval and verification: gather current information from trusted web and documentation sources
- Multi-cloud pricing lookup: query Azure, AWS, and GCP pricing and compare options
- Analysis and computation: run estimation and comparison workflows
- Output generation: create artifacts such as email-ready content and downloadable files
- End-to-end orchestration: combine multiple tools to complete tasks, not just answer questions

commands.description: Show what I can help you with

commands.description: Look up real-time Azure service pricing

commands.title: strategy
commands.description: Executive, product, or technical strategy advice
